{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2005
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 2005
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 2 – June 22
|num_teams       = 64
|champions       = [[Paulista Futebol Clube|Paulista (SP)]]
|runner-up       = [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]
|matches         = 117
|goals           = 331
|top goal scorer = [[Fred (footballer, born 1983)|Fred]] (15)
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2004 Copa do Brasil|2004]]
|nextseason      = [[2006 Copa do Brasil|2006]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 2005''' was the 17th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]]. 

The competition started on February 2, 2005 and concluded on June 22, 2005 with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio São Januário]] in [[Rio de Janeiro]], in which [[Paulista Futebol Clube|Paulista]] lifted the trophy for the first time after a 0-0 draw with [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]].

[[Fred (footballer, born 1983)|Fred]], of [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]], with 15 goals, was the competition's topscorer.

==Format==
The competition was contested by 64 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format where all rounds were played over two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used, but in the first two rounds if the away team won the first leg with an advantage of at least two goals, the second leg was not played and the club automatically qualified to the next round.

==Competition stages==
{{64TeamBracket 

| RD1-team01=[[Sport Club Corinthians Alagoano|Corinthians (AL)]]
| RD1-score01=0
| RD1-team02='''[[Associação Desportiva São Caetano|São Caetano (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score02=2

| RD1-team03=[[Sport Club Ulbra|Ulbra (RS)]]
| RD1-score03=3 0
| RD1-team04='''[[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze (PB)]]'''
| RD1-score04=0 5

| RD1-team05=[[Centro de Futebol Zico de Brasília Sociedade Esportiva|CFZ (DF)]]
| RD1-score05=0
| RD1-team06='''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score06=2

| RD1-team07=[[Palmas Futebol e Regatas|Palmas (TO)]]
| RD1-score07=0 1
| RD1-team08='''[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score08=1 3

| RD1-team09=[[Campinense Clube|Campinense (PB)]]
| RD1-score09=1 1
| RD1-team10='''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score10=0 3

| RD1-team11='''[[Clube Esportivo de Bento Gonçalves|Esportivo (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score11=4 0
| RD1-team12=[[Londrina Esporte Clube|Londrina (PR)]]
| RD1-score12=1 2

| RD1-team13=[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]
| RD1-score13=2 0
| RD1-team14='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score14=1 1

| RD1-team15=[[Cuiabá Esporte Clube|Cuiabá (MT)]]
| RD1-score15=1 0
| RD1-team16='''[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score16=1 2

| RD1-team17=[[Clube Atlético Hermann Aichinger|Hermann Aichinger (SC)]]<ref>[[Clube Atlético Hermann Aichinger|Hermann Aichinger (SC)]] fielded an ineligible player in the first leg so the classification was awarded to [[Ituano Futebol Clube|Ituano (SP)]].</ref>
| RD1-score17=0
| RD1-team18='''[[Ituano Futebol Clube|Ituano (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score18=0

| RD1-team19=[[Associação Atlética Coruripe|Coruripe (AL)]]
| RD1-score19=1 1
| RD1-team20='''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]]'''
| RD1-score20=1 3

| RD1-team21=[[Estrela do Norte Futebol Clube|Estrela do Norte (ES)]]
| RD1-score21=3 0
| RD1-team22='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score22=4 6

| RD1-team23=[[Sociedade Desportiva Serra Futebol Clube|Serra (ES)]]
| RD1-score23=2 2
| RD1-team24='''[[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense (DF)]]'''
| RD1-score24=2 4

| RD1-team25=[[River Atlético Clube|River (PI)]]
| RD1-score25=1 1
| RD1-team26='''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score26=1 3

| RD1-team27='''[[Ypiranga Clube|Ypiranga (AP)]]'''
| RD1-score27=2 1
| RD1-team28=[[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (AM)|São Raimundo (AM)]]
| RD1-score28=0 3

| RD1-team29=[[Sociedade Esportiva União Cacoalense|União Cacoalense (RO)]]
| RD1-score29=0 1
| RD1-team30='''[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu (PA)]]'''
| RD1-score30=1 3

| RD1-team31=[[4 de Julho Esporte Clube|4 de Julho (PI)]]
| RD1-score31=0 2
| RD1-team32='''[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]'''
| RD1-score32=0 3

| RD1-team33=[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa (MA)]]
| RD1-score33=1 0
| RD1-team34='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score34=1 3

| RD1-team35='''[[Cianorte Futebol Clube|Cianorte (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score35=2 1
| RD1-team36=[[Centro Esportivo Nova Esperança|CENE (MS)]]
| RD1-score36=1 1

| RD1-team37='''[[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense (SC)]]'''
| RD1-score37=1 1
| RD1-team38=[[America Football Club (RJ)|América (RJ)]]
| RD1-score38=0 2

| RD1-team39=[[Grêmio Atlético Coariense|Grêmio Coariense (AM)]]
| RD1-score39=1 2
| RD1-team40='''[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]'''
| RD1-score40=1 4

| RD1-team41=[[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (RR)|São Raimundo (RR)]]
| RD1-score41=1
| RD1-team42='''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score42=4

| RD1-team43='''[[Paulista Futebol Clube|Paulista (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score43=1 1
| RD1-team44=[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude (RS)]]
| RD1-score44=0 1

| RD1-team45=[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Chapadão|SERC (MS)]]
| RD1-score45=1 0
| RD1-team46='''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score46=2 2

| RD1-team47='''[[Friburguense Atlético Clube|Friburguense (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score47=4 1
| RD1-team48=[[Associação Atlética Caldense|Caldense (MG)]]
| RD1-score48=1 2

| RD1-team49=[[Clube Recreativo e Atlético Catalano|CRAC (GO)]]
| RD1-score49=0 1
| RD1-team50='''[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score50=0 2

| RD1-team51=[[Associação Cultural e Desportiva Potiguar|Potiguar (RN)]]
| RD1-score51=0
| RD1-team52='''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score52=4

| RD1-team53=[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]]
| RD1-score53=0 0
| RD1-team54='''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score54=1 7

| RD1-team55='''[[Ipatinga Futebol Clube|Ipatinga (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score55=2 2
| RD1-team56=[[Americano Futebol Clube|Americano (RJ)]]
| RD1-score56=0 2

| RD1-team57=[[União Esporte Clube|União (MT)]]
| RD1-score57=2 0
| RD1-team58='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score58=2 2

| RD1-team59=[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco (AC)]]
| RD1-score59=1
| RD1-team60='''[[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Club (MA)]]'''
| RD1-score60=3

| RD1-team61=[[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança (SE)]]
| RD1-score61=1 0
| RD1-team62='''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score62=0 3

| RD1-team63='''[[Associação Cultural Esporte Clube Baraúnas|Baraúnas (RN)]]'''
| RD1-score63=2 1 (pen: 4)
| RD1-team64=[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]
| RD1-score64=1 2 (pen: 2)


| RD2-team01=São Caetano (SP)
| RD2-score01=1 1
| RD2-team02='''Treze (PB)'''
| RD2-score02=2 1

| RD2-team03='''Coritiba (PR)'''
| RD2-score03=0 3
| RD2-team04=Náutico (PE)
| RD2-score04=1 0

| RD2-team05='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD2-score05=2 1
| RD2-team06=Esportivo (RS)
| RD2-score06=1 0

| RD2-team07='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD2-score07=1 3
| RD2-team08=Vila Nova (GO)
| RD2-score08=1 1

| RD2-team09='''Ituano (SP)'''
| RD2-score09=2 1
| RD2-team10=Fortaleza (CE)
| RD2-score10=0 2

| RD2-team11='''Atlético (MG)'''
| RD2-score11=3
| RD2-team12=Brasiliense (DF)
| RD2-score12=1

| RD2-team13='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD2-score13=2
| RD2-team14=Ypiranga (AP)
| RD2-score14=0

| RD2-team15=Paysandu (PA)
| RD2-score15=2 0
| RD2-team16='''Ceará (CE)'''
| RD2-score16=0 4

| RD2-team17='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD2-score17=0 5
| RD2-team18=Cianorte (PR)
| RD2-score18=3 1

| RD2-team19='''Figueirense (SC)'''
| RD2-score19=0 4
| RD2-team20=Remo (PA)
| RD2-score20=1 2

| RD2-team21=Botafogo (RJ)
| RD2-score21=1 2
| RD2-team22='''Paulista (SP)'''
| RD2-score22=1 2

| RD2-team23='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD2-score23=1 4
| RD2-team24=Friburguense (RJ)
| RD2-score24=1 0

| RD2-team25=Guarani (SP)
| RD2-score25=0 0
| RD2-team26='''Santa Cruz (PE)'''
| RD2-score26=2 0

| RD2-team27='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD2-score27=3
| RD2-team28=Ipatinga (MG)
| RD2-score28=0

| RD2-team29='''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD2-score29=2 6
| RD2-team30=Moto Club (MA)
| RD2-score30=1 0

| RD2-team31=Vitória (BA)
| RD2-score31=0 1
| RD2-team32='''Baraúnas (RN)'''
| RD2-score32=1 2

| RD3-team01='''Treze (PB)'''
| RD3-score01=1 0
| RD3-team02=Coritiba (PR)
| RD3-score02=2 1

| RD3-team03='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD3-score03=3 1
| RD3-team04=Grêmio (RS)
| RD3-score04=0 0

| RD3-team05=Ituano (SP)
| RD3-score05=0 1
| RD3-team06='''Atlético (MG)'''
| RD3-score06=0 3

| RD3-team07=Flamengo (RJ)
| RD3-score07=0 1
| RD3-team08='''Ceará (CE)'''
| RD3-score08=2 1

| RD3-team09=Corinthians (SP)
| RD3-score09=2 0 (pen: 2)
| RD3-team10='''Figueirense (SC)'''
| RD3-score10=0 2 (pen: 3)

| RD3-team11='''Paulista (SP)'''
| RD3-score11=0 1 (pen: 4)
| RD3-team12=Internacional (RS)
| RD3-score12=1 0 (pen: 2)

| RD3-team13=Santa Cruz (PE)
| RD3-score13=0 1
| RD3-team14='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD3-score14=4 0

| RD3-team15=Vasco (RJ)
| RD3-score15=2 0
| RD3-team16='''Baraúnas (RN)'''
| RD3-score16=2 3

| RD4-team01=Treze (PB)
| RD4-score01=0 1 (pen: 8)
| RD4-team02='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD4-score02=1 0 (pen: 9)

| RD4-team03=Atlético (MG)
| RD4-score03=1 0
| RD4-team04='''Ceará (CE)'''
| RD4-score04=1 2

| RD4-team05=Figueirense (SC)
| RD4-score05=1 0 (pen: 1)
| RD4-team06='''Paulista (SP)'''
| RD4-score06=0 1 (pen: 3)

| RD4-team07='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD4-score07=7 5
| RD4-team08=Baraúnas (RN)
| RD4-score08=3 0

| RD5-team01='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD5-score01=2 4
| RD5-team02=Ceará (CE)
| RD5-score02=2 1

| RD5-team03='''Paulista (SP)'''
| RD5-score03=3 2
| RD5-team04=Cruzeiro (MG)
| RD5-score04=1 3

| RD6-team01=Fluminense (RJ)
| RD6-score01=0 0
| RD6-team02='''Paulista (SP)'''
| RD6-score02=2 0
}}


{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />2005 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira do Estado de São Paulo.svg|100px|São Paulo]]<br>'''[[Paulista Futebol Clube|Paulista]]'''<br/>'''First Title'''
|}

===Notes===
<references/>

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070220174553/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr2005.htm Copa do Brasil 2005 at RSSSF]
*{{in lang|pt}} [https://web.archive.org/web/20071214105525/http://www.bolanaarea.com/tabela_copabr_2005.htm Copa do Brasil 2005 table at Bola na Área]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 2005}}
[[Category:2005 in domestic association football cups]]
[[Category:2005 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2005]]
